minting_now.description:
Own a **Page NFT of the Voynich Manuscript** and you do not just buy digital art - you claim a stake in one of history’s greatest unsolved mysteries.

The Voynich is not another collectible built on hype. It is a symbol of **enigma, rarity, and cultural immortality**: a manuscript no one has definit

minting_now.name: SKUULZ
minting_now.description:
8888 SKUULZ is a pixel art collection on the Ethereum blockchain, built for people who care about identity, culture, and strong communities.

Every SKUUL has its own mix of traits, so each one feels different and carries its own vibe, while still staying true to that raw pixel style. The inspiration

minting_now.name: Flicker #26
minting_now.description:
In 1992, a scorched floppy disk was recovered from the ruins of a cybercafé fire.
Its only surviving file: mc-death.exe

No one knows who made it. No one knows what it does.

But those who run it see things. Feel things.

This is not a PFP project. It’s a corrupted transmission.

64 digital skulls.

minting_now.name: Lil Dickbutts
minting_now.description:
Made for degens.
Keep away from children.

minting_now.name: Caotic Master
minting_now.description: Caotic master swap to Coatic coin hello world

minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: Based Doodle Punks
minting_now.description: 2222 Doodle Punks encapsulates the essence of spontaneous and imaginative doodling, an art form that resonates with creativity and authenticity.

minting_now.name: Abstracts
minting_now.description:
"Abstracts" is a compelling NFT collection of abstract art, rendered solely in the timeless elegance of black and
white. Pure form. Profound emotion. Limitless interpretation. Own the quiet power.

minting_now.name: Night Pulse
minting_now.description:
"The world slows down.

But here, life continues — quieter, deeper, more resilient.

Not everything needs daylight to exist."
